subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but Him, and He Who hath appeared is verily the Hidden Mystery that lay treasured and concealed throughout all eternity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و الذی ظهر انه لهو السر الذی کان مکنونا مخزونا فی ازل الآزال
subcodes.subjects: @power of the Manifestation of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @chastisement and requital
